features: ❤ Professional False Eyelashes: High-end false eyelashes are a must-have for beauty girls and women to beautify the eyes. Its effect is amazing. The eyelashes are lengthened and thickened to make the eyes look bigger, brighter, fuller and more radiant.

❤ Premium 3D Faux Mink Eyelashes: Our false eyelashes are handmade, environmentally friendly and do not infect the eyes. These fake eyelashes are as same as human real eyelashes, can be naturally and harmoniously overlapped.

❤ Easy to Apply and Remove: All these could wear easily, extremely soft and comfortable. It need to glue it up with glue and can be attached to your eye easily. These eyelashes are very long and can be trimmed as needed.

❤ Reusable: False eyelashes can be used to create a variety of stage effects, such as Wedding, Halloween parties, Make-up parties or other shows to help you create a glamorous, natural look. Also, these false eyelashes need your care so that you can reuse them again and again!
❤ Top Quality Services: We offer you high quality False Eyelashes and give you a satisfactory solution if quality problems occurred. Please feel free to contact us if have any needs.
description: Product Description Keiby Citom is a professional beauty brand owner for more than 10 years. We are committed to manufacturing high quality, durable, portable, comfortable and reliable beauty tools. Each false eyelashes is handmade and do not infect the eyes. All these are easy to wear, extremely soft and comfortable. The beautiful set is a great gift for yourself, families and friends! If have any other problems about false eyelashes, please let us know and we will solve for you soon. How to use Firstly, trim the long false eyelashes at the end of the false eyelashes as you need; After applying a proper amount of eyelash glue to the root evenly, let it stand for 20 seconds to maximize the viscosity of the eyelash glue; Then gently press the false eyelashes to the eyes to fit the true eyelashes. Adjust the eye shape with precision eyelashes clip before the eyelashes are completely dry; Use the eyelash curler to gently clip the true and false eyelashes together. The force should not be too large, the separation of true and false eyelashes will make the eyes weaken; Finally use mascara to make the true and false eyelashes fit closely and use the eyeliner to fill the true and false eyelashes. You will have a beautiful charming eye. False Eyelashes Description: Color: Black Length: 16mm Quantity: 4 Pairs Material: 3D Faux Mink Eyelashes Terrier: Plastics and Cotton Terrier Features: Suitable for all eye shapes and sizes, no need to press hard, just glue it up with glue to make your eyes look bigger and brighter, let your more powerful and confident. Easy to make a variety of makeup Keiby Citom False Eyelashes 4 paries are perfect for grooming your eyes. No matter which makeup style you want, such as sweet, sexy, fun and beautiful, these are all meet your need. Parties, gathering, traveling or at home, you will have a fascinating look. Perfect Present for Your Love False Eyelashes are girls' best friend. A excellent present for all girls and women who love beauty as Valentine's Day gift, Birthday gift & Christmas gift.
